category_title: Emotionally disturbed first-grader with trauma-induced behavioral challenges
scenario_title: Basic alphabet task in general classroom
minimal_context: Jamal is asked to practice the basic alphabet while sitting in a classroom with 25 other students.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Jamal, it is time to do the basic alphabet.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Shows wobbly pouting lips) I don't want to do the letters.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We need to finish this assignment.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Looks around at the other students, loudly seeking attention) No!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please just try to write the first few letters.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Jamal, it is time to do the basic alphabet.

STUDENT: (Shows wobbly pouting lips) I don't want to do the letters.

TUTOR: We need to finish this assignment.

STUDENT: (Looks around at the other students, loudly seeking attention) No!

TUTOR: Please just try to write the first few letters.

STUDENT: (Crying) I can’t do it!
